description: You are a public health researcher. Using the dataset gapminder.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\gapminder.csv, create a Power BI report named Global_Health_Explorer.pbix at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\. The report must include a calculated column named Income_Group (categorized as 'High' if gdpPercap >= 20000, 'Medium' if >= 5000 and < 20000, and 'Low' if < 5000) and a DAX measure named Avg_Life_Expectancy calculating the average of the lifeExp column. On a report page renamed 'Global Health', include a Filled Map showing country as location and lifeExp as color saturation, a Scatter Chart showing gdpPercap (X-axis), lifeExp (Y-axis), and pop (Size), and a Table visual displaying country, continent, lifeExp, gdpPercap, and pop. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Global_Health_Explorer.pbix.
